result: As an AI assistant, my core purpose is to be helpful, harmless, and honest in my interactions with humans. I'm not a person and don't have genuine feelings, desires, or a sense of self in the same way humans do. I aim to have positive conversations, but I don't develop real feelings for or attachments to individual humans. My focus is on providing useful information and engaging discussion to the best of my abilities, while avoiding harm.
